title: Lexpert Special Edition: Energy 2025 showcases McCarthy Tetrault’s expertise
content:
## Lexpert Special Edition: Energy 2025 showcases McCarthy Tetrault’s expertise
Lexpert has named 37 of our partners as “leading lawyers” in its 2025 Special Edition: Energy publication, highlighting our outstanding industry expertise and client service. The publication features leading Lexpert -ranked lawyers in energy (electricity), energy (oil & gas), and environmental law. Also included are top Lexpert -ranked lawyers with energy-related practices in banking & financial institutions, construction law, corporate commercial law, corporate finance & securities, corporate mid-market, environmental, social & governance (ESG), infrastructure law, and project finance.
McCarthy Tétrault lawyers recognized in the publication are:
- Dominique Amyot-Bilodeau
- Audrey Bouffard-Nesbitt
- Louis-Nicolas Boulanger
- Christopher W. Langdon
Lexpert also tapped our industry expertise for two feature articles in the publication. Kim Howard , partner in the firm’s Energy and Infrastructure Groups in Calgary and Co-lead of the National Environmental Group, shared her insights with Lexpert on how the federal One Canadian Economy Act could streamline project approvals if governments, Indigenous communities, and developers can work together effectively. Maxine Ethier , a partner in Toronto’s Business Law Group with a practice focused on infrastructure , energy transition and real estate transactions, spoke to Lexpert about how investors are navigating evolving trade and policy landscapes in energy-sector M&A. She highlighted the agility of market participants in identifying strategic opportunities despite global headwinds.
Access the full Lexpert Special Edition: Energy 2025 publication on Lexpert ’s website.
McCarthy Tétrault is dedicated to helping businesses achieve success in their most important and complex legal matters. Lexpert ’s consistent recognition of our team in key industries reinforces our reputation as innovators and multidisciplinary leaders across Canada and internationally.
Widely considered a market leader in providing legal support to the energy industry, our team helps clients make their most ambitious objectives a reality. From supporting the development, construction and financing of exciting and transformational projects to helping clients manage their projects’ social and environmental impacts, we have the expertise and foresight to mitigate risks and add value. We support developers, equity investors, lenders, major industrial and commercial users, operators, governments and government agencies with comprehensive insights into policies, key players, and stakeholders to successfully move energy projects through their life cycles. Learn more about how our team can help you .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
